title: Selective Keepinventory
description: Makes you able to enable keepinventory selectively for each player.
body:
Allows you to control who has keepinventory. By default, no one does. But give them the tag 'KeepInventoryTrue', and they will.

Replace [Player Name] with the players name.
Enable keep inventory for a player:
```
/tag [Player Name] add KeepInventoryTrue
```
Disable keep inventory for a player:
```
/tag [Player Name] remove KeepInventoryTrue
```

Made via heavy use of macros. So requires 1.21, marcos, and shit. May work elsewhere, but idk.
